roles.prompt: a clearly featured lead or solo line with controlled phrasing and no competing melody
short answering phrases only inside clear gaps, followed by intentional silence
a concise recurring signature motif, distinct from the vocal melody
brief call-and-response phrases that never overlap the vocal
a restrained secondary line that supports without copying the main melody
a low-density foundation with no lead contour and no attention-seeking movement
a short transition gesture connecting sections without becoming a new theme

presets.prompt: Tight modern drum groove with punchy kick, restrained snare, controlled hi-hat detail and humanized timing. Low density, no Arabic loop cliché.
Soft acoustic brush-kit pulse with muted kick, dry snare brush and sparse cymbal detail. Intimate, restrained and supportive.
Single deep sub-bass layer with smooth sustained notes, minimal movement and controlled low end. No melodic distraction.
presets.captureRule: One defined sound source, close centered capture, no unrelated accompaniment.

presets.prompt: Warm acoustic double-bass with rounded attack, sparse root movement and restrained passing tones. Natural timing and no jazz walking.
presets.captureRule: One performer, one instrument, close centered capture, no unrelated accompaniment.

presets.prompt: Single short-neck bowl-backed fretless lute with paired courses, dark wooden resonance, firm plectrum attack and short natural sustain. Sparse single-note phrasing, no guitar voicings.
presets.captureRule: One performer, one instrument, close centered dry capture, no unrelated accompaniment.

presets.prompt: Single steel-string acoustic guitar with warm woody body, soft fingerstyle articulation and sparse open voicings. No lead melody.
Warm vintage Rhodes bed with soft sustained voicings, restrained harmonic movement and gentle bell tone. No soloing.
Dry upright piano punctuation using short low-density notes at phrase endings. Natural hammer noise, immediate silence and no continuous comping.
Restrained live Riq and soft Darbuka pulse with natural hand timing, controlled dum and dry tak. Tasteful fills only at transitions.
Minimal organic shaker and finger-percussion detail with sparse accents and human timing. Every hit has purpose.
Single Iraqi Joza with raw skin-resonator tone, natural bow friction, restrained slides and microtonal phrasing. Short purposeful phrases with silence.
presets.captureRule: One performer, one instrument, close centered dry capture, no unrelated accompaniment.

presets.prompt: Single dark acoustic violin with controlled portamento, restrained vibrato and Iraqi phrasing. Concise vocal-like lines, never continuous.
presets.captureRule: One performer, one instrument, close centered dry capture, no unrelated accompaniment.

presets.prompt: Single warm cello in the low register with sparse bowed answers, restrained slides and long pauses. Keep clear of the vocal range.
Small restrained string section holding soft sustained harmony with gentle section lifts. No lead melody and no cinematic swell.

Original monophonic hybrid lead with a soft asymmetric attack, warm analog body, breath-like texture, controlled portamento and maqam-aware pitch bends. Premium sound-design character, not an ethnic preset.
presets.captureRule: One designed hybrid voice only, no chords, bass, percussion or accompaniment.

presets.prompt: Monophonic glass-organic hybrid lead with a clean transient, hollow resonant body, subtle wavetable motion and expressive pitch glide. Clear solo identity and restrained decay.
Warm analog pad with slow attack, long controlled release and subtle harmonic drift. Stable background layer with no rhythmic pulse or lead contour.
Short elegant reverse swell and soft downlifter designed for a clean section transition. Minimal, controlled and non-cinematic.
Subtle high-frequency air texture with restrained shimmer and slow movement. No melody, no rhythm and no obvious riser shape.
Small muted brass color using soft sustained notes and short restrained punctuation. Warm, dry and low density.
Single mellow flugelhorn with soft attack, warm breath, restrained vibrato and concise lyrical phrases. Dry solo capture.
Single end-blown reed flute with dry breath attack, hollow air column, subtle pitch instability and restrained microtonal turns. Short phrases with clear silence.
presets.captureRule: One performer, one instrument, close centered dry capture, no unrelated accompaniment.

presets.prompt: Single low-pitched end-blown folk flute with earthy breath, rough natural edge and sparse descending phrases. One stable timbre only.
presets.captureRule: One performer, one instrument, close centered dry capture, no unrelated accompaniment.

presets.prompt: Single dark clarinet with woody low register, restrained bends and intimate lyrical phrasing. No orchestral doubling.
Single exposed lead vocal guide with intimate delivery, controlled ornaments and clear phrasing. No backing vocals or choir.
Restrained backing-vocal unison entering only at selected phrase endings. Short, soft and subordinate to the lead.
Low-density full-song sketch preserving clear vocal space, controlled section growth and purposeful entrances. Avoid generic Arabic arrangement habits.
Single trapezoidal plucked zither with grouped triple strings, dry woody transient, short decay and sparse finger-plectrum articulation. No sweeping glissando.
presets.captureRule: One performer, one instrument, close centered dry capture, no unrelated accompaniment.

presets.prompt: Single designed hybrid solo voice combining a muted pluck transient, warm analog core and breath-textured upper layer. Expressive monophonic taqsim with controlled portamento and original timbre.
presets.captureRule: One designed hybrid voice only, no accompaniment or second sound source.

presets.prompt: Two-part call and response: one short Joza phrase followed by one short Ney answer. Never overlap; preserve clear silence between them.

identities.prompt: Authentic Iraqi melodic identity with restrained maqam phrasing, deep longing and human expression
Iraqi 1970s tarab identity with warm acoustic character, measured phrasing and no modern Arabic-pop cliché
Contemporary Iraqi identity with refined production and no generic oriental presets
Warm Baghdad-night melancholy with elegant restraint and low density
Mesopotamian emotional gravity with organic detail and spacious dynamics
Premium global hybrid production with authentic Iraqi phrasing and original sound design

emotions.prompt: Restrained hope with warm emotional lift

sections.prompt: Designed for the intro with a clear identity and space for the next section
Designed for the verse without masking the singer
Build controlled tension before the chorus
Provide a stronger lift while preserving vocal space
Bring a fresh but coherent color to the bridge
Close with a restrained final gesture
